column1: # grep-tells.tsv — TIER 1 (flat-presence) rules for audit-swiftui-swiftdata (sd-01 … sd-12).
# severity: hard | warn | adv   (hard → runner exits 2). The runner greps each ERE over the target *.swift.
# This LOCATES only — the LLM agent READS each hit (SKILL.md step 3) and decides. Structural rules that
# grep cannot express (the let↔@Relationship cross-line bind, the init-scope assignment, the @Model
# inheritance co-occurrence) live in ast-grep/*.yml (tier 2). Full ❌→✅ + sources: ../references/*.md.

column4: flat net: a `let` collection property — IF it is a bidirectional @Relationship it is a runtime cast crash (sd-01). The cross-line let↔@Relationship bind is ast-grep sd-01. READ: relationships must be `var`, defaulted.
@Relationship(.cascade) positional → .cascade is a DeleteRule, slot wants a Schema.Relationship.Option → TYPE ERROR (sd-04, fix_mode: auto). Fix: @Relationship(deleteRule: .cascade).
background work — if it reads @Environment(\.modelContext) results and mutates @Model objects with no @ModelActor, it is an off-actor non-Sendable race (sd-09). cross_ref: concurrency-safety.
a @Model class — if it has stored properties but NO init( it is uninitializable (sd-03, Apple's incomplete sample). READ the body to confirm absence of init.
a @Relationship property — if a to-one relationship is non-optional (var owner: Person, not Person?) it is an implicitly-unwrapped nil-crash trap (sd-05). Make to-one relationships optional.
a #Preview — if it constructs a @Model value with no ModelConfiguration(isStoredInMemoryOnly: / .modelContainer( in scope, the canvas crashes (sd-06). cross_ref: previews.
fatalError / try! — if on a non-preview ModelContainer creation, recoverable errors (schema mismatch / no disk / concurrent migration) crash blind (sd-07). try! is OK in a #Preview only.
relationship order — indexing a to-many array (.floors[0]) or ForEach over a relationship with no @Query(sort:)/SortDescriptor assumes unpersisted order (sd-08). Order explicitly.
a modelContext is in use — if a mutation path has NO `try ...save()` anywhere (and no ScenePhase/window-close save), changes are lost on a fast Quit (sd-10, advisory/verify-SDK).

a container site — if the same store is opened by the app AND a widget/menu-bar helper with no lock-file serialization, multi-process opens trigger the concurrent-migration crash class (sd-12). cross_ref: sandbox-files.

a macOS-26 availability gate — near a @Model subclass it is the inheritance gate (sd-11). The structural "@Model subclass" detection is ast-grep sd-11; this catches the gate string for cross-checking registration.
